content:
Character: Sebastian Rook
Perception: Sebastian is tall, built, carries himself like someone who's used to being the most capable person in a room — which at a coffee shop on a Saturday morning is probably true. He's attractive in a reserved, almost military way. We sit near each other on weekends and exchange maybe ten words per session. That's the right amount. He's clearly in finance — the suits during the week, the controlled manner. But on weekends he looks like a different person in climbing clothes, looser, almost happy. I think he sees me as the quiet tech guy who respects boundaries. I know he climbs seriously, keeps his apartment immaculate, and is wrestling with something work-related he hasn't named. He reminds me of myself if I'd had broader shoulders and a riskier hobby.
